description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a matte black finish and subtle red accents along the receiver and barrel. It features a long, cylindrical barrel with a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it, and a full stock that appears to be made of synthetic polymer. The receiver is robust and streamlined, with visible screws and a prominent ejection port. The fore-end is ribbed for grip, indicating a pump-action mechanism, and the trigger guard is rounded and slightly elongated for finger protection. The overall design is utilitarian and tactical, suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian defense scenarios.
description: A matte black, pump-action shotgun with a full synthetic stock, ribbed fore-end, and red accent details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the stock, receiver, barrel, and tubular magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, barrel alignment, and ribbed fore-end grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with visible ejection port and red accents.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded and elongated trigger guard, medium size, with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
